report.title: Report a bug
report.description: Tell us what went wrong. Your report is saved to the central tracker so it can be triaged and fixed.
report.successDescription: Thank you — your report was saved and will be triaged.
report.error: Could not send the report. Please try again.

fields.title: Summary
fields.descriptionPlaceholder: Steps to reproduce, what you expected, and what happened instead.

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.description: An unexpected error occurred in this section and has been reported automatically.

page.title: Bug Reports
page.description: User reports and automatically-captured crashes, in one tracker. Resolve a report to record how it was fixed.
page.searchPlaceholder: Search by title, code or route…

empty.title: No bug reports
empty.description: Nothing matches your filters. Reported bugs and captured crashes will appear here.

detail.notFound: This report could not be found.

resolve.heading: Document the fix
resolve.intro: Record what it was and how it was fixed. This is saved to the fix memory so the same problem is recognised next time.
resolve.preventionPlaceholder: How can this be avoided in future?
resolve.error: Could not resolve the report. Please try again.

knowledge.title: Fix Memory
knowledge.description: Every documented resolution. When a known problem reappears, the matching fix surfaces automatically so it never has to be diagnosed twice.

empty.title: No fixes recorded yet
empty.description: When a bug report is resolved, its root cause and resolution are saved here.

knowledge.reused: Recurred {count, plural, one {# time} other {# times}}
knowledge.reusedTitle: How many later reports matched this fix
